sentences.arabic: تَعْمَلُ حَنَانُ فِي مَكْتَبَةٍ عَامَّةٍ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hanan radi u javnoj biblioteci u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Hanan works in a public library in the city.

sentences.arabic: تُرَتِّبُ الْكُتُبَ وَتُسَاعِدُ الزُّوَّارَ فِي إِيجَادِ مَا يُرِيدُونَ.
sentences.translation: Sređuje knjige i pomaže posjetiocima da nađu šta žele.
sentences.translationEn: She organises books and helps visitors find what they want.

sentences.arabic: تُحِبُّ الْعَمَلَ لِأَنَّهَا تُحِبُّ الْكُتُبَ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Voli posao jer jako voli knjige.
sentences.translationEn: She loves the work because she loves books very much.

sentences.arabic: يَأْتِي أَطْفَالٌ كَثِيرُونَ إِلَى الْمَكْتَبَةِ وَتُرَحِّبُ بِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Mnogo djece dolazi u biblioteku i ona ih prima toplom.
sentences.translationEn: Many children come to the library and she welcomes them.
